name: Ground Meat in a Skillet
recipeIngredient: Ground chicken breast (3/4 lb), skinless, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the ground chicken breast, bread crumbs, whipped egg white, 1/4 cup skim milk, onions, bell peppers, salt, black pepper, and dry mustard until well combined.
2. Form the mixture into 12 balls.
3. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
4. Add the meatballs to the skillet and brown on all sides.
5. Place the meatballs around the edge of the skillet.
6. In the center of the skillet, combine low-fat cream of mushroom soup (10 3/4 oz), remaining skim milk (3/4 cup), and thawed frozen mixed vegetables.
7. Pour the sauce mixture into the skillet.
8. Simmer for 12 minutes before serving.
